subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Qiblih of the ardent lovers, but whom the ungodly have prevented from attaining Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی قبله العشاق و منعه المشرکون عن الحضور لدی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
